prompt: A peaceful Renaissance Italian instrumental piece for a city map menu. Solo lute carrying a gentle melody, soft recorder weaving in and out, occasional sustained chord on harpsichord. Calm, contemplative, painterly — evokes a quiet morning in 15th century Florence. No percussion. Loopable.

A lively Renaissance Italian instrumental piece for a craftsman's workshop scene. Lute carrying a working, slightly faster melody, recorder accents, light tambourine or hand-drum tap on offbeats — never busy, always rhythmic. Evokes apprentices at work in a 15th century Florentine bottega. Loopable.
